company.name: Roongta Developers
company.address: 4th Floor, Roongta Shopping Center, VIP Road, Vesu, Surat, Gujarat

policy.fixed_holidays: Public Holidays (Fixed) will be given, as notified by the company at the beginning of each Calendar year.
policy.special_declaration: In case the working of the office is likely to be hampered on account of any reason, the company may declare a public holiday or weekly holiday (except National Holidays) to be a normal working day and declare the affected day to be a holiday.
policy.working_hours_review: The Working hour's policy will be reviewed on Quarterly basis.
policy.management_rights: The management and the HR Department reserve the right, at its sole discretion, to change, modify, add, remove, delete, any above terms and conditions without any prior notice and its decision shall be final and binding.

holidays.name: New Year Day

notes.post_diwali_resumption: After Diwali Holiday, Office/Site Work will resume from Labh Pancham 2026-11-14 Saturday
